testcase.name: testProcessData
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-27 13:31:32.317 [main] INFO logging.LoggingBasics - Processing data: hello 2026-06-27 13:31:32.317 [main] DEBUG logging.LoggingBasics - Data length: 9 2026-06-27 13:31:32.317 [main] INFO logging.LoggingBasics - Data processed successfully: HELLO

testcase.name: testProcessNullData
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-27 13:31:32.318 [main] INFO logging.LoggingBasics - Processing data: null 2026-06-27 13:31:32.318 [main] WARN logging.LoggingBasics - Received null data, returning empty string

testcase.name: testParameterizedLogging
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-27 13:31:32.319 [main] INFO logging.LoggingBasics - User 'TestUser' logged in after 3 attempts 2026-06-27 13:31:32.320 [main] DEBUG logging.LoggingBasics - Login details - User: TestUser, Attempts: 3, Timestamp: 1782547292320

testcase.name: testDemonstrateLogLevels
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-27 13:31:32.321 [main] TRACE logging.LoggingBasics - TRACE level: Most detailed information 2026-06-27 13:31:32.322 [main] DEBUG logging.LoggingBasics - DEBUG level: Debugging information 2026-06-27 13:31:32.322 [main] INFO logging.LoggingBasics - INFO level: General information 2026-06-27 13:31:32.322 [main] WARN logging.LoggingBasics - WARN level: Warning - potential issue 2026-06-27 13:31:32.322 [main] ERROR logging.LoggingBasics - ERROR level: Error occurred
